productDisplayName: Baggit Women Beige Chata Josh Wallet
description: Style NoteTraditional craft techniques get a fashion-forward twist in this baggit's beige coloured wallet. Finished with knit textured appeal, this eclectic style will make the perfect accompaniment to a bold colour-block look. So, what are you waiting for? Just grab this wallet with fine knitted detailing and turn the heads around.Product Details Two fold beige wallet with press button flap closure Four card holders and one id card holder on the first fold Two slots separated by a pocket with zip closure and three insert pockets on the second fold   Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust  Size Height: 9 cm Width: 14 cm Depth: 1 cm
